long_description:
[COM]-kube-proxy pod is not ready [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_insufficient_running_pods_for_deployment.html
TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready
TIP Short Description: A pod is not ready for the past 10 minutes

TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone1-zonelet:node:dal1-qz6-sr3-rk016-s42
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Metric:

Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone1-zonelet' and kube_pod_name = 'device-agent-57bh4'

Time:             12/02/2025 07:45 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
